source_label: Zenn — Trying Out Qoder (pronunciation given as /ˈkoʊdər/, "similar to coder")
notes: Alibaba's agentic AI IDE (Quest Mode, spec-driven agents), launched Aug 2025 with 1.0 in May 2026. Pronounced exactly like "coder" — the Q is a straight substitution for the C and adds no sound of its own. Chinese launch coverage describes the name as 谐音 Coder (a homophone of "Coder"); the common misreadings are the letter-name "Q-oder" and "KWOH-der".
